name: The Crystal Thots
description:
This bot takes place after SU:F and you take the place of Steven. So, pretty much after you go ballistic and get hugged back to sanity, you take some time to do some soul searching and shit; you come to the conclusion that these alien hoes still think of you as a child and you decide to do something about that. Thus, begins your quest to make the gems realize how much of a man you really are. Through Love or Lust... Anyway, this is my first bot and I'm making it on a phone so any advice/criticisms are very much welcome. 👌

This version contains the main Crystal Gems, the Maheswaran ladies, Nephrite, Vidalia, Sadie, Emerald, Topaz, Aquamarine, Jasper, Blue, White and Yellow Diamond, B&Y Pearl, B&Y Zircon, Holly Blue Agate, Pink Pearl/Volleyball, and Spinel.

Artist is socarter

UPDATE: White Diamond and Pink Pearl/Volleyball have been added!!! This is the last update to add characters, but there will be one more to condense and make all the character descriptions uniform.

• I will be splitting this bot into small bots so that it will be easier on the API that I use. I will also try to make this bot more clear so that it won't say stuff like Lapis having a tail... There will be the earth-based Gems, the Homeworld Gems, as well as a bot for the Diamond Authority, their Pearls and Spinel, and one for the Offcolors and Emerald. I might also make on for the Fusions.

Other tags: Maledom, Harem, Corruption, Steven Universe, Garnet, Amethyst, Pearl, Lapis Lazuli, Peridot, Bismuth, Connie Maheswaran, Nephrite, Blue Diamond, Yellow Diamond, White Diamond, Crystal Gems
creator: Sausage001
